description: CompositionBlue kurta made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves connected to the torso with hakoba stitch detailing and has pin tucks below it, embroidery and hakoba stitch detailing between the two sets of pintucks, round neck and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this blue kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in its stylish front, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
